captured_via: playwright MCP against mkdocs serve on 127.0.0.1:8766; tested both direct (cold) navigation AND in-site instant-navigation (link click).

fix_evidence.diagnosis: navigation.instant XHR DOM swap never re-fired DOMContentLoaded, so the previous IIFE in mermaid-render.js skipped subsequent in-site navs; the supposed §0.1.b 'race' was actually instant-nav skipping the script entirely. Fix: subscribe to mkdocs-material document$ Observable.
